content: The app was better at first but a few days later it wasn't unreliable. Keep crashing all the time and nothing can be done unless you visit a nearby branch where they end up not helping anyway. Never using it again

very bad app, I'm not able to do any transactions for the last week, I'm traveling and can go to the bank, very slow response from the customer service, no response for email and the problem is still not solved.

I can't get an option to input code for my PayPal withdrawal,they just show code sent to the phone number but I can't input the code sent,also if I tap the more options button, still on the PayPal withdrawal, nothing shows,it should display the email option for the code,fix this

I want to thank you Equity Bank. It's Very important for a Bank account to allow airtime purchase any time.. It's the best Banking app So far for me for the past few years. Please Do not Hesitate to Download this app it's is the Best Banking app in Uganda per now

The app keeps delaying and even keeps not respond when signing in,the app is just a mess it keeps telling me I'm on CRB and ive cleared everything and trying to update it there's nothing there,i can never recommend anyone to use this mobile app...
You disabled the receipt of the OTP via email. That is not a good thing because it limits options and slows down work. Reinstate the option please.
Useless app, I tried to register; requested for OTP but I cannot put in the OTP. Please fix that, it's really annoying especially from a bank with your reputation 😒

Am from Rwanda, so this app i would have rated it with 5 stars but when the app have been updated, i updated it but when i opened it, i went to borrow session, and it can't even show me the available loan nor permit me to borrow that 1 month loan
makes work easier unlike going to the bank. it would have been 5 stars but I don't like a long process when sending money to my mpesa I equally think it would've been better to pay by biometrics
Not so reliable for emergency transactions. The app may fail to open when you need it most. Used to be good but not anymore
I am disappointed,the app doesn't allow me to send money to another number,it takes time at the convention stage and returns you to start a fresh
this is a good app but I have an issue with auto verification whenever I receive an OTP for verification, I'm not able to fill the numbers in the given slot what shall I do?

the app is good, but buying of float to mpesa still missing considering it the most useful part as far as Telco agents are concerned .. why not integrate it instead of using *247#to access the service

what I don't understand is if this is meant to make banking easier why is it so frustrating to simply sign in. You guys need to do better just getting access to ones account is a hustle I did email you guys yet nothing has been done
the previous app was supurb.this one can reach at a point and fail to open up.or opens up ,transact and fail to confirm your transactions.am a disappointed man at a point I need money urgently
The app is smooth and easy to use. It handles all my banking needs and I never need to step into the banking hall
very unreliable when you need it, it fails you, system failures now and then, work on that please.
I deposited money on my equity account but unfortunately It's not showing up on the balance so far one hour what could be the problem
This app is worsed compared to the previous once as it take ages to reflect money transacted from another account... Ni mbovu zaidi.... bring back the old one...
it's useless app if you want to register after sending you otp numbers they don't let you put in.
efficient app and reliableapp... but please allow recipient delete on mobile money transfer...it doesn't allowsomeone to delete unwanted recipients .
nice app. no advertisement,quick and efficient. the remaining one star is for later experience.
This app is very slow and hungs a lot. This is frustrating and disappointing. @Equity Group solve this issue
It's really great, but improve on how to deposit using your phone at lower costs
it's sometimes has an issue when logging in but all the while it works
sometimes have delays,, 😔 like now I want to pay a parcel and it's not opening.
Transactions are done in a fast way.
Equity Bank has just proved to me today that they are truly the people's Bank. Equity Bank is awesome. I'm never changing Banks.
Aside from relying on the main branch for technical issues, for me it's the best
system is slow and it keep denying the correct password you have to keep trying
This is a great application for all your transactions. Things have been made simpler and better
The App is convenient. I can do my bank transactions at the comfort of my phone.
verification code for transactions is a problem, cant receive it through email
Secure and reliable service with good and timely customer response
I find the equity mobile app aazing so long us I have my line that I registered with in the same mobile phone IAM using everything becomes as simple as reading an amazing story..

Four stars. The app is good for easy navigation and easier access to services but it's like each update is worse than the previous one. The latest one is lagging a lot even when the internet connection is stable and they keep sending multiple notifications for a single transaction. Kindly check on this.
it's good because it has simplified work.
quite reliable, fast and sure.
it's a good app Iam using for long time Equity is account for hustler wote . I' Love one in the bank I. kenya ,when you need a loan ,it's so good

I'd appreciate if the app could allow self registration without having to visit the bank. If I forget my password again I have to visit the bank so I really wonder what's the purpose of security questions? Tried renaming my Goals/savings account,it logged me out, went to the bank only for them to say systems are down after waiting for almost 6 hours - yes 6 hours because the bank is always full of customers with complaints everyday. Don't get me started on the USSD, pls Do Better!
Stuck today,I can't access my money, everytime something went Wrong kindly work on errors
Very easy to use and faster!!
most efficient and fast working app
faster, easy to use and securd
The best banking app from the best bank!!!
This App had helped me soo much its good and fast and its easier to use

I was a fan of the old app. uncluttered. quick. this new one is unreliable. it has left me stranded many, many times. it is laggy, it is slow, it is overburdened and cannot navigate smoothly between what it offers I never pull it out when I need it now - I depend on my other bank Apps fix it. have you managers on it - using it - and fix it. use the products you offer.

Why is it that we have an option of creating savings account from the app but its not being processed? I have tried many times creating saving account from my personal account and its not going through. I was advised to create a different saving account so that I can transfer money to that account. What is the essence of having savings account in the app if its not useful?

I like the new app, there's so much more to it. However, on the finance manager, I find it so odd that items like menstrual products have been left out while it is a monthly necessity for many ladies. These products are not cheap

The app is good but a bit confused on mobile loan and salary advances, esp balances. I wish this issue is taken seriously. Let's be honest. I don't think I am alone experiencing this. Am urging KCB to fix the problem and allow us enjoy the services. Thanks. Issues of incorrect loan balaces in this app have already been fixed. This app deserves 5*
Pretty useless app. I keep on getting error messages when I want to retrieve my statement. The older app is 100x better because it always works, this one is too unpredictable

why, in 2026 do i always have to come to the bank to get the app activated, yet I transact everyday with apps I don't even need an id. now it's been 3 months since i changed phones and ive been too busy to get to the bank. but the question, why do I need to go to the bank to get the app activated???????

The app is good but you should include the kcb mpesa on the app like the old app. we are having trouble accessing the kcb mpesa on the ussd expecially us who are in diaspora due to roaming and network problem

Very disappointing experience. The MMF feature does not work properly and feels like it wasn’t fully tested before release. Customer service is also slow and unhelpful service zenyu ni tubaya 😒. Kindly improve the app functionality and support.
the app is very modern. it updates balances instant after withdrawal. i would a feature where you pay direct to mpesa till no. i dont see in my phone app
Pretty good so far the UI is intuitive and material the verification is also nice with the additional of fingerprint security basically a good update to the previously good old app from before

The app has really good features but occasionally very annoyingly slow, can't complete transactions without trying like 4 times in some cases. OTP taking a century to arrive, logging into the app is a hustle. This is after clearing cache, data, uninstalling and re-installing. Do something about performance and stability really

The performance of this App is unratable, so pathetic, basic functions take ages to load, money transfer almost impossible. How can I get the old App back ? If there's a time KCB has missed , it's with this new app. Functions like Paybill, Till , RTGS should have been automatically built. Even App size matters,for modest devices there will be impact on core functions.

I hate this new version... because what do you mean I have to log in every time instead of just imputing my password. and worse still it has to use the data in that same simcard when you have a WiFi connection...so annoying.Yall. honestly had the best app but decided to ruin it

I don't leave reviews, but you have frustrated me enough to leave this review. problems: 1. unclear communication, when bringing up a new app 2. when I login I can't use the app and I don't know why, I have to go to the bank for me to fill a form and wait for 15-30 minutes for it to be approved. 3. the app is slow but great aesthetics, even if it is beautiful and I have to wait for it to load what is the esssence recommendation, avoid the trouble and shift

This is the worst app ever. It is useless to have it and a total waste of space on your phone.It is super slow and has incorrect information such as durations. Something that is 30 days shows up as 30 months. Accessing the app is too difficult and payment errors from the app cannot be reversed as advised by their customer support team. KCB do better and invest in developers who will give you a seamless app to use. Other banks are doing so well. What a shame!
i can't even login since the new update " we are experiencing a technical error/problem" 😕. please return the old version ......
its so annoying whn making trasactions and they send you an OTP which isnt evn going through. the old app was evn better.

This app is very frustrating. Takes forever to launch, sometimes transactions don't go through. Something as rudimentary as getting a mini statement is not working. All these problems started after the update to the current new app.

Worst app ever,slow & i mean SLOOOW ,login issues and the OTP part takes forever,again it stops working you visit a Kcb bank branch ,the issue is sorted then when you just left it goes back to not working .very stressfull.
Great features. however the app is quite slow when Login in. I'm having to close the app multiple times before it finally takes me to the login page. Please note this is not a network issue.
The self onboarding is a nightmare. The ID scan AI camera must have been very poorly trained. I can hardly go beyond the scan. Don't tell me to go to branch in 2026.

useless app,,,when initiating withdrawals using the app and you receive the code ,you are not given space to type the code so as to complete the transactios,the screen just stays blank without the touch screen showing the keyboard to type.
app is really frustrating so slow and doesn't load at all. why would I be limited to using bundles yet I'm on wifi? Even when I turn off wifi app ain't loading! Doesn't make sense.
am unable to register. I have only managed to scan only the front side of my id. I have tried many times but the same system bug keeps coming up. very poor KCB
the app is very slow during transactions. you have to open it twice before it functions. The technical team kindly do something.
How can I transact from a savings account I opened since I can't find the account from where you select the account required for transactions
what a terrible app, seriously kcb? how hard can it be to implement a login functionality that works? This app keeps on spinning at login screen. Also, please stop sending double push notifications

I'm disappointed about this app. I tried to login for the first time using my mobile phone and I received the verification code on my mobile phone but it doesn't auto detect neither does it allow me to enter the code manually so I'm stuck.
very unreliable, can't go past log in. And if it goes, you can't transfer or carry any transaction. Cannot recommend. My days of using KCB are coming to an end.
one of the worst App to be ever created, Truly Useless....it keeps saying technical issues every while..cant use the app without Sim card and Everytime it requires OTTP CODE...Bullshi
absolute Masterpiece. I wonder why it took KCB so long to develop such an amazing application the older version was terrible for sure
its good ...now with the investment tabs and type shiii ...its low-key kinda cool ..💯💯
efficient and easy to use..gives me different options

After several months of use, I can confidently say that the app is quite unreliable. Many are the times that it won't open up. Honestly, the older version was more reliable and user friendly Edit: I have an auto update setting on play store, so it's already updated. Please improve from your end
improve on speed it takes time to log in
it's sometimes very slow to open and it doesn't have a detailed day to day transaction like the one before
The app is loading too slow, and sometimes fails to log in, this is discouraging.
app does not login. Tried everything. Restarting my phone, internet, the app. Cant seem to gain access.
I can barely make any transaction. It loads forever 🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️Switch on and off the data still 🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️I can get past the log in button !!!!
One of the best mobile banking apps that I've interacted with. Kudos for the great work
Too many steps to access funds. Failed me on a few occassions. Back to the old app.
your app is becoming slow.loading for too long and not opening. can you rectify the mistake.

I have used this app and I make these observations and hopefully they will get addressed. 1. The app is slow , too slow when logging in. 2. This new app does not have the feature of viewing transactions for the whole month in terms of percentage inflow and outflow like the previous one. 3. this new app only gives a statement of the very day only. I have tried referring to previous days, nothing coming. all the above makes it very useless unlike the previous one.
good app to enhance easy transaction
